title: Marinated Argentinian Cheese Skewers
description: A garlicky and cheesy Argentinian dish featuring dried cherries, perfect for a monsoon evening, this recipe is jain-friendly and cooked to perfection in a wok.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a wok over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the dried cherries and cook for 2 minutes until they start to soften.
Add the paneer cheese cubes and cook for 3 minutes until they start to brown.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the marinade over the cheese and cherries, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes until the cheese is coated in the marinade.
Remove from heat and stir in the chopped parsley.
Thread the cheese and cherry mixture onto skewers and serve hot.
